info.english_meaning: to cleanse to purify to  to decorate
info.hindI_arTa: svacCa karanA DonA pavitra honA alaMkfta karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SOcAlaNkArayorvA RO mfjermArjati mArjayet ' (Slo. 60) iti devaH  ' mfjUz ' iti kzIrasvAmI

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kfpaRAnATavfdDAnAM yadASru parimArjati' (BA0 SAM0 9138) parimArjati parimArzwi proYCati
'kaTamekapade sarvamOcityaM parimArjatu' (rAja0 3313) parimArjatu parilumpatu curAdirADfzIyo'tra DAtuH
'jihvAmudDara sarvezAM parimfjyAnumfjya ca' (BA0 SAM0 8119) parimfjya pariSoDya dozAnapanIya
'tundaSokayoH parimfjApanudoH' (pA0 325) tundaparimfjo'lasaH tundaM jaWaraM parimArzwi spfSati iti tadvyutpattiH
